rationale: US-Iran settlement claim and Xi Jinping's Pyongyang visit both carry indirect but real implications for Ukraine: the former signals US diplomatic bandwidth shifting, the latter reinforces the Russia-support axis.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', cancels strikes
top_events.summary: US diplomatic focus on Iran deal may reduce attention and resources available for Ukraine support; signals Trump's dealmaking approach could extend to Russia-Ukraine negotiations.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalize China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Strengthened China-DPRK axis reinforces the broader anti-Western alignment supporting Russia; potential for increased military supply chains to Russia is a real concern for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Active war with Russia — no new escalation
top_events.summary: War continues; no qualitative change reported this cycle.
